tokens.summary: Go-wide token army with anthems, token makers, and mass protection. Prefer one-sided wipes and creature-based ramp.
antiPatterns: Mass creature board wipes without protection
Cards that sacrifice all your creatures

voltron.summary: Stack equipment and auras on the commander; prioritize protection, evasion, and efficient removal.
packages: Equipment Suite (Swiftfoot Boots, Greaves, premium swords)
antiPatterns: Too many board wipes that kill your commander setup
Slow five-mana engines with no equip support

aristocrats.summary: Sacrifice creatures for value and drain; need outlets, death triggers, and recursion.
packages: Sac Outlet Core (Viscera Seer, Ashnod's Altar)

blink.summary: Flicker creatures for ETB value; prioritize enter-the-battlefield payoffs and protection for key pieces.

group-slug.summary: Make everyone lose life/resources while you stabilize; incremental drain and tax effects.
packages: Group Slug Core (Ob Nixilis, Bloodchief Ascension)
antiPatterns: Too few ways to protect your life total
Symmetric lifegain that only helps opponents

counters.summary: +1/+1 counter synergy with proliferate and counter payoffs; protect your board.

reanimator.summary: Fill the graveyard then reanimate large threats; recursion and protection for reanimated bodies.
antiPatterns: Exile-heavy meta with no graveyard plan

spellslinger.summary: Instants and sorceries matter; copy, discount, and cast triggers generate advantage.
antiPatterns: Creature-heavy midrange with no spell synergy

lands.summary: Extra land drops, landfall, and lands-as-resources; mana base is the deck.
packages: Extra land + landfall (Azusa, Retreat to Coralhelm)
antiPatterns: Too few lands for the strategy

tribal.summary: Shared creature type with lords and density; interaction and ramp still required.
antiPatterns: Too few creatures of the tribe
Mixing two tribes without commander support

superfriends.summary: Planeswalkers as engines and win conditions; proliferate and protection extend loyalty plans.
antiPatterns: Too few walkers for proliferate payoffs

artifacts.summary: Artifact mana, payoffs, and finishers; affinity, tokens, or sacrifice sub-themes.
antiPatterns: Too few artifacts for payoff cards
Mixing unrelated tribal or voltron packages
